title: Tributes to Buffy and Ted Lasso star Anthony Head after death aged 72
summary_full: The British actor, who also appeared in Merlin and Little Britain, died of complications from pneumonia.
summary_public: The British actor, who also appeared in Merlin and Little Britain, died of complications from pneumonia.
